Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All measured parameters are within normal limits except for elevated LDL cholesterol and low HDL cholesterol, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Glycemic control, renal function, electrolytes, and lipid panel (total cholesterol and triglycerides) are otherwise unremarkable. Recommend addressing dyslipidemia and monitoring cardiovascular risk factors.
